sourceFailure.failingTest: test/rendererMigrationV2170Parity.test.ts > renderer migration v2170 parity > keeps declared operator lifecycle renderers byte-identical after builder migration
sourceFailure.symptom: remote normalized Markdown length was 12415 while the v2173 expected length was 12435
sourceFailure.scope: single parity assertion failure after the full Linux CI test run reached the tail of coverage

details: The local Windows checkout has direct sibling Java and mini-kv evidence files for the artifact intake preflight profile.
The Linux runner lacks those direct sibling files and therefore renders missing file-reference objects for the same semantic slots.
v2173 already normalized file-reference byteLength and digest values, but it still preserved the JSON exists flag.
Two true local file references versus two false remote file references created a 20-character local/remote normalized length drift.

changedFiles: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2144-renderer-parity-file-reference-exists-normalizer-v2174.md
implementation.normalizationRule: JSON file-reference triples of the form exists + byteLength + digest now normalize exists, byteLength, and digest together when calculating renderer migration parity hashes.

safetyBoundary.stopCondition: Future normalizer changes are allowed only for checkout-local path or file metadata drift. Business fields and Markdown structure must remain inside the parity hash.

passed.command: npx vitest run test/rendererMigrationV2167Parity.test.ts test/rendererMigrationV2168Parity.test.ts test/rendererMigrationV2169Parity.test.ts test/rendererMigrationV2170Parity.test.ts --maxWorkers=2

localNotes: npx vitest run --maxWorkers=2 timed out after 20 minutes without assertion output; the spawned vitest process tree was stopped.
npx vitest run --maxWorkers=4 timed out after 30 minutes without assertion output; the spawned vitest process tree was stopped.
The complete suite passed with --maxWorkers=8, which keeps concurrency below the prior default-worker process storm while giving the suite enough throughput.

parallelProjectStatus.java: recommended parallel; v2174 only changes Node test comparison infrastructure and consumes no fresh Java evidence
parallelProjectStatus.miniKv: recommended parallel; v2174 only changes Node test comparison infrastructure and consumes no fresh mini-kv evidence
